curation_notes: Patch commit 7558f07 changes a single line in src/Image/Cache.php within the resolve_url function: the case-sensitive comparison `$name === "image"` is replaced with `strtolower($name) === "image"`. The advisory explicitly names the file and function. Only 1 source file was changed (not noisy). The pre-assigned vuln_class auth-bypass is retained because the vulnerability allows circumventing the URI protocol allowlist (an authorization control) via case-sensitive tag name comparison, consistent with CWE-551 (Incorrect Behavior Order: Authorization Before Parsing and Canonicalization) and CWE-863 (Incorrect Authorization). No sibling files share this exact vulnerability pattern — the SVG tag name check is unique to this location in the image caching code.
